title: The Rarest Kind Of Solar System
description:
Out of all the different kinds of solar systems, ours appears to be the rarest! 

Simulations and surveys of other planets tell us that the most common solar system is one where all the planets are about the same size. 

So then HOW did ours get like this? The leading theory has to do with Jupiter!

To learn more, subscribe!

#science #space #solarsystem #rare  #shorts
